testcase.name: test_dashboard_fail_closed_when_token_missing
testcase.failure: tests/test_dashboard_auth.py:20: in test_dashboard_fail_closed_when_token_missing assert resp.status_code == 503 E assert 404 == 503 E + where 404 = <Response [404 Not Found]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_dashboard_requires_token_when_configured
testcase.failure: tests/test_dashboard_auth.py:50: in test_dashboard_requires_token_when_configured assert resp.status_code == 401 E assert 404 == 401 E + where 404 = <Response [404 Not Found]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_dashboard_token_query_sets_cookie
testcase.failure: tests/test_dashboard_auth.py:79: in test_dashboard_token_query_sets_cookie assert resp.status_code == 303 E assert 404 == 303 E + where 404 = <Response [404 Not Found]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_dashboard_token_header_allows_api
testcase.failure: tests/test_dashboard_auth.py:92: in test_dashboard_token_header_allows_api assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404 Not Found]>.status_code
